item.title: Trump administration's mixed messaging on war with Iran: ANALYSIS
item.description: Now days into President Donald Trump's war against Iran, much of the administration's messaging has been confusing or contradictory.

item.title: Iran war live updates: Israelis to 'advance' in Lebanon amid Hezbollah strikes
item.description: The U.S. and Israel launched a joint attack on Iran on Saturday, officials said.

item.title: WATCH: March's full moon brings total lunar eclipse
item.description: David Muir reports on the best time billions of people will be able to view the total eclipse.

item.title: WATCH: Passengers evacuate by slides after engine fire on United flight at LAX
item.description: Passengers aboard a Boeing 787 Dreamliner were forced to evacuate by slides after the United Airlines flight landed at Los Angeles International Airpo...

item.title: Jalisco cartel leader 'El Mencho' buried in a golden casket in a Guadalajara cemetery
item.description: The leader of the Jalisco New Generation Cartel has been buried in a shiny golden casket with enormous flower wreaths and a large military presence in...
